allow:
Bash(git -C ~/code/VisualSketchpad commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add vision tool cache, lazy client init, per-turn timing, and output cleanup

- Tool cache: content-based SHA-256 caching for segment_and_mark,
  detection, and depth tools to avoid redundant Gradio calls
- Lazy vision client initialization: connect to SOM/GD/DA services
  only on first use instead of at import time
- Per-turn timing: record duration and token usage for each LLM call
  and code execution, saved as timing.json
- Strip base64 images from output.json to reduce file size
- Add docs/prebaked_structure.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
